_meta.keyKnowledge: We develop and refine our skills in drama elements, performance, expression and design across specific styles and forms.

_source.w: We develop and refine our skills in drama elements, performance, expression and design across specific styles and forms.
y: Building strong drama skills gives us the technical foundation to bring creative ideas to life.
Understanding style-specific conventions helps us create authentic and effective performances.
Refining our skills through practice and feedback leads to consistent improvement.
eg: We develop vocal techniques appropriate to different drama styles — projection, accent, rhythm.
We refine our physical performance skills including movement, gesture and spatial awareness.
We practise using design elements to enhance our drama pieces.
We study specific drama forms and practise the conventions that define them.
We give and receive detailed feedback using appropriate drama terminology.
We set skill-development goals and work towards them throughout the term.
